arts.ttl: ‘It’s not enough' – Arsenal trio to cost them the title in battle for top spot with Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal's Premier League title hopes were dealt a blow on Saturday, and Jamie Carragher has named three players who could scupper their chances of catching Liverpool

arts.ttl: The 20 best managers in the world: Arne Slot number one, Guardiola sinks
arts.sum: And Xabi Alonso and Leverkusen continue to seriously impress, with the Spanish boss expected to find a new home - perhaps Real Madrid - by the end of the season. Inzaghi's side have real domestic pressure in the form of Napoli and to a lesser extent Atalanta this season, but so far the Nerazzurri are doing their level best to keep them at bay to retain their title.

arts.ttl: Lisandro Martinez and Jamie Carragher incident, Liverpool icon's U-turn, Roy Keane reply
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has taken yet another swipe at Lisandro Martinez following Manchester United's defeat by Brighton, adding to the latest chapter in their longstanding feud

arts.ttl: Who are the best Liverpool picks ahead of Double Gameweek 24?
arts.sum: The Scout assesses the best way to invest in Liverpool in Fantasy Premier League for their kind schedule including their Double Gameweek 24 (DGW24), discussing whether you should triple up on players or leave a spot open to use the Assistant Manager chip on Arne Slot. If you currently own Salah and Alexander-Arnold, for example, and have already played your Triple Captain chip, then using the Assistant Manager chip on Slot over three Gameweeks essentially gives you a third Liverpool pick without using a precious free transfer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Lille Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Form Guide
arts.sum: Liverpool will look to maintain their 100% Champions League record when they host unbeaten Lille at Anfield tonight. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predi...

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer target set for new Anfield audition as huge decision nears over next club
arts.sum: Jonathan David was a transfer target for Liverpool in 2020 and will be in action at Anfield tonight

arts.ttl: 'I flopped at Liverpool - but I helped convince Virgil van Dijk successor to sign'
arts.sum: Liverpool have one of their flops to thank for the signing of Ibrahima Konate, who has gone on to become one of the club's most important players

arts.ttl: I'd only sell Darwin Nunez for £100m - Liverpool cannot let him leave now
arts.sum: Didi Hamann wants Liverpool to keep hold of Darwin Nunez this month as he believes his old club could win the Quadruple

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Lille: Can anyone stop Arne Slot from winning Champions League?
arts.sum: Liverpool will host Lille at Anfield in the Champions League on Tuesday night, and the Reds are arguably the favourites to win the competition.
